# Epic Template

## Epic Header
- Epic ID: `<E-xxx>`
- Epic Title: `<title>`
- Owner: `<role/person>`
- Target Release: `<release id>`
- Status: `<idea/refining/ready/in-progress/done>`

## Outcome
- Problem: `<problem to solve>`
- Outcome Goal: `<desired outcome>`
- Success Metrics: `<metric + target>`

## Scope
- In Scope:
  - `<item>`
- Out of Scope:
  - `<item>`

## Delivery Notes
- Dependencies: `<dependencies>`
- Risks: `<risks>`
- Story Breakdown Plan: `<link or short plan>`
